events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"high","work_stage":"in-service","component_conditions":["degraded","failed"],"percent_complete":100,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.85,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Thermal growth offset ignored on hot service, causing misalignment under operating temperature","In-service shaft misalignment leading to vibration, coupling/bearing overload, and accelerated wear"],"actions":["Shut down or reduce service if vibration/seal distress is evident","Perform hot alignment check and calculate required thermal growth offset per API 686 and OEM data","Realign using laser system with thermal compensation and verify hot running alignment"],"rationale":"API 686 requires accounting for thermal growth on hot service equipment; ignoring it leaves the unit misaligned at operating temperature, causing vibration and premature coupling/bearing/seal failure.","references":["API 686","laser system manuals"]}
